statement: In every magma, Equation 2971 (`x = ((y * (y * z)) * w) * w`) implies Equation 859 (`x = x * ((y * z) * (y * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0056
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y z)) w) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op y z) (op y w)))
